description: Next.js 14 submission flow web app with Supabase auth, storage, and database

stories.title: Project scaffolding and configuration
acceptanceCriteria: package.json exists with next@14, react@18, @supabase/ssr, tailwindcss ✅

stories.title: TypeScript types, Supabase clients, and middleware
acceptanceCriteria: src/types/index.ts exports SubmissionStatus, SubmissionType, Submission, SubmissionFormData ✅
src/lib/supabase/server.ts exports async createClient() with cookie handling ✅
src/middleware.ts redirects authenticated users away from /login and /signup ✅

stories.title: Database and storage SQL files
acceptanceCriteria: supabase/schema.sql exists with complete submissions table ✅
supabase/storage.sql exists with bucket and policies ✅

stories.title: Root layout and NavBar component
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/layout.tsx exists with NavBar and gray-50 background ✅
NavBar shows SubmitApp logo linking to / ✅
NavBar shows email + Log out when authenticated ✅
NavBar shows Log in + Sign up when not authenticated ✅
NavBar is sticky top with white background ✅
Log out calls signOut() and redirects to / ✅
useEffect uses stable supabase ref (no missing deps) ✅

stories.title: Landing page
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated: Log in + Sign up buttons ✅

stories.title: Login and Signup pages
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/login/page.tsx exists with email + password + submit ✅
Signup shows confirmation message on success ✅
Both pages have centered card max-w-[400px] with proper labels ✅

stories.title: ImageUploader component
acceptanceCriteria: Shows upload icon and instructions in default state ✅
Validates MIME type and 5MB size limit ✅
Shows image preview after valid file selected ✅

stories.title: Submission form with full submit logic
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/submit/page.tsx checks auth and renders SubmissionForm ✅
Type cards with role='radio', aria-checked, keyboard accessible ✅
Identifier input with 40-char limit and live counter ✅
Submit button disabled until all fields filled ✅
Submit shows spinner + Saving... during submission ✅
Success state with green checkmark SVG, ID, StatusBadge ✅
Error messages are user-friendly with form preserved ✅

stories.title: Dashboard page
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/dashboard/page.tsx fetches submissions for auth user ✅
Table with Identifier (mono), Type, Status, Points, Date ✅

stories.title: SETUP.md documentation
acceptanceCriteria: SETUP.md exists with all 5 required sections ✅
Supabase setup covers schema.sql and storage.sql ✅

stories.title: TypeScript compilation passes with no errors
acceptanceCriteria: No 'any' types in any source file ✅ (verified)
No useEffect with missing dependencies ✅ (NavBar fixed with useRef)
